news.headline: China’s UN Envoy: Hormuz closure will dominate Trump-Xi talks
news.summary: China's UN Ambassador Fu Cong says maintaining the ceasefire and reopening the Strait of Hormuz are “urgent” priorities.

news.headline: US bypasses congressional review for military sales of $8.6 billion to Middle East allies
news.summary:
<p>United States President Donald Trump’s administration has bypassed congressional review to approve military sales totalling over $8.6 billion to Middle Eastern allies Israel, Qatar, Kuwait and the United Arab Emirates (UAE).</p>
